Subject: Isomorphic Meeting Readout

OFFICIAL

DSIT, FCDO colleagues,

Please find below a readout from SoS and HMA’s meeting with Isomorphic.

Isomorphic Meeting
*KK
Attendees: Third Party Isomorphic), Third Party Isomorphic), Peter Kyle (SoS, DSIT),

Emran Mian (DG DTG, DSIT), JCS _— (SpAd, DsIT), JCS (PS, DSIT), Peter Mandelson (HMA to the US), JCS
JCS [PSto HMA tothe US), YCS ‘Head of Tech Policy, BCGSF)

Overall comment: this meeting focused on the value of the UK’s data sets and the best way of making them accessible
to drive progress in drug discovery. Isomorphic were enthusiastic about the UK’s strengths and clear about the
potential of a UK-US partnership to deliver a more coherent, pro-innovation regulatory environment.
